title: Update bell icon reminder presets inadequate
excerpt: The Update bell icon only give 5 preset times to receive a reminder notification.  Why? Those are pretty random presets. Is there a way to pick the date and time that would meet your personal business needs?

posts.author: JNo (jim nosich)
posts.cookedHtml: The Update bell icon only give 5 preset times to receive a reminder notification. Why? Those are pretty random presets. Is there a way to pick the date and time that would meet your personal business needs?
